---
title: "01_assembly"
author: "Kaushik Surej"
date: "2026-07-15"
output: html_document
---

# Step 1
## Running the fastq file within the flye directory helps in assembling a long-read metagenomic sequencing data within the metagenome mode
## Nanopore reads produced at a high quality. Threads 12 that have been allowed to run allows parallel processing to improve computational efficiency

```bash
flye --nano-hq ../raw_data/bbd_0.1.fastq.gz --threads 12 --out-dir bbd --meta
```
